creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
The current version 3.14.10 has pkg-plist issues:
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: include/facter/facts/base_resolver.hpp
Error: Orphaned: include/facter/facts/external_resolvers_factory.hpp
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

The full log can be found here:
https://pkg.fechner.net/data/121amd64-gitlab/2020-06-03_11h03m51s/logs/errors/facter-3.14.10.log
